description: Reformat the research manuscript 'manuscript_draft.odt' in Apache OpenOffice Writer to comply with ACS journal submission guidelines. Set 1-inch (2.54 cm) margins on all sides, change all body text to 12pt Times New Roman, and set line spacing to Double (200%). Enable continuous line numbering for the entire document. Add a running header on every page with the text 'Microplastic Accumulation in Great Lakes Tributaries' and add centered page numbers to the footer. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the 7 main section titles (Abstract, Introduction, Materials and Methods, Results and Discussion, Conclusions, Acknowledgments, References) and 'Heading 2' style to the 6 subsection titles. Format the 25 reference entries with a 0.5" (1.27cm) hanging indent. Save the formatted manuscript to /home/ga/Documents/manuscript_formatted.odt.

metadata.header_text: Microplastic Accumulation in Great Lakes Tributaries
